title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (with Tel Aviv HQ)
description: Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine as the company enters its next growth phase. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling revenue beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience with globally distributed teams collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ is essential. Finout is a cloud cost management company trusted by The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps/GTM with deep Salesforce expertise and experience scaling high-growth companies directly matches Finout's Head of RevOps requirements. The Tel Aviv HQ connection and remote-first setup align perfectly with his location preferences and global team collaboration experience.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and immediately thought of you—a fintech-focused cloud cost management platform scaling from $30M+ ARR needs exactly the kind of hands-on RevOps leadership you've built your career on. With your track record scaling B2B SaaS revenue operations and the company's Tel Aviv roots, this feels like a natural fit to help build their next-generation GTM engine reporting directly to the CRO.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: As RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations, you'll accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Responsibilities include maintaining territory mapping in CRM systems like Fullcast and Salesforce, leading market expansion and capacity modeling projects, and partnering with Sales leadership and Finance. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue Operations or Sales Strategy, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. Gong builds revenue intelligence software.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience exceeds the 3-5 year requirement, with direct expertise in Salesforce, territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, and data analytics. Gong's revenue intelligence focus aligns perfectly with Omri's GTM and RevOps specialization.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building scalable revenue operations and GTM strategies in B2B SaaS, and Gong's approach to revenue intelligence resonates deeply with how I think about data-driven seller enablement. Your Territory Strategy & Operations role caught my attention because territory design and capacity modeling are areas where I've driven significant productivity gains, and I'd welcome exploring how my Salesforce, analytics, and go-to-market expertise could accelerate your expansion initiatives.

title: GTM Engineer
description: A foundational role for Gradient Labs' GTM motion, owning the systems and signals behind how they identify, segment, and reach their ICP, stitching BDR, marketing, and sales ops into one streamlined operation. You'll build qualified target lists within a tightly defined enterprise ICP and own the outbound motion end-to-end across email and LinkedIn. Requires 5+ years in rev ops, marketing ops, or sales ops at an enterprise SaaS company, account-based motion experience, a systems-building instinct, fluency with HubSpot, Clay, and Apollo, and genuine AI fluency.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's GTM/RevOps expertise, systems-building mindset, and B2B SaaS background. The role perfectly matches his target profile (GTM Engineer, RevOps focus) with required HubSpot/enterprise SaaS experience, though the outbound execution component is slightly more tactical than his typical strategic scope.

I've built similar AI-native workflows across HubSpot and demand-gen stacks, and I'm curious whether you're looking for someone to scale this beyond the initial playbook.
